etymology.description: Depicts two stylized blocks of ice, suggesting the concept of cold or freezing.
etymology.interpretation: The character 冫(piān, "cold") depicts two compressed and stylized blocks of ice, representing the idea of cold. This radical is commonly used in characters related to ice or coldness, capturing the visual simplicity and fundamental concept of ice in visual form.

examples.chinese: 冬天时(冬天時)，河水都结成冰(河水都結成冰)。
examples.pinyin: Dōngtiān shí, hé shuǐ dōu jié chéng bīng.
examples.english: In winter, the river water freezes into ice.

examples.chinese: 他的手像冰一样冷(他的手像冰一樣冷)。
examples.pinyin: Tā de shǒu xiàng bīng yīyàng lěng.
examples.english: His hands are as cold as ice.

examples.chinese: 打开冰箱(打開冰箱)，可以感觉到冷气扑面而来(可以感覺到冷氣撲面而來)。
examples.pinyin: Dǎkāi bīngxiāng, kěyǐ gǎnjué dào lěngqì pūmiàn ér lái.
examples.english: When you open the refrigerator, you can feel the cold air rush out.
